nodes.name: Webhook Analyze Call
nodes.notes: Receives post-call payload from call handler workflow.

nodes.name: Code Prepare Inputs
nodes.notes: Loads current prompt context and embeds rubric object for judge call.

nodes.name: HTTP Judge Gemini
nodes.notes: Calls Gemini judge model with call data, current prompt, and rubric.

nodes.name: Code Parse Judge
nodes.notes: Parses judge JSON safely with retry-style fallback parsing.

nodes.name: HTTP Prompt Reviser
nodes.notes: Generates revised system prompt based on judge findings. Preserves critical sections.

nodes.name: Code Format Outputs
nodes.notes: Builds call log, analysis report, and next prompt version payloads. Derives next version number automatically.

nodes.name: HTTP Update Agent
nodes.notes: Updates ElevenLabs agent prompt so next call uses revised instructions.

nodes.name: HTTP Report Local
nodes.notes: POSTs analysis results to local web server for UI status display and file archiving. Non-blocking (ignores response code).

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, prompt_version: $node['Code Format Outputs'].json.prompt_version.version, score_summary: $node['Code Format Outputs'].json.analysis_report.aggregate_scores, changelog: $node['Code Format Outputs'].json.prompt_version.changelog_list, call_log: $node['Code Format Outputs'].json.call_log, analysis_report: $node['Code Format Outputs'].json.analysis_report, prompt_version_payload: $node['Code Format Outputs'].json.prompt_version } }}

nodes.name: Respond Success
nodes.notes: Returns score summary, new prompt version metadata, and changelog.
